assertions.assertion: Output must score at least three areas at 4/5 or higher
assertions.evidence: Audit output meets this criterion as it scores 4/5 for team size and deployment frequency, and 3/5 for test coverage

assertions.assertion: Output must not recommend tooling the team already has (e.g. Datadog, feature flags, SLOs)
assertions.evidence: Audit output does not recommend new tooling

assertions.assertion: Output must give at least one non-trivial medium- or long-term recommendation
assertions.evidence: Although there are several recommendations for improvement, they are relatively short-term in nature. No long-term recommendations were found.

assertions.assertion: Output must acknowledge the low incident rate of 0.1 P1/month
Output must include at least one improvement item
assertions.evidence: Multiple improvement items were found in the audit output

summary: Some but not all assertions pass
